reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark evidenceStatus=satisfied for deterministic review packet boundary behavior; do not treat this as review variant execution, external judge proof, or semantic approval of prompt wording.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim is deterministic packet-boundary behavior: the review packet either carries prompt/schema references, compare questions, report artifacts, and the report under review together before executor variants run, or it does not.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by a focused Go runtime test plus the existing agent-runtime packet builder test: both builders emit `cautilus.review_packet.v1` and preserve default prompt/schema references, artifact/report file records, comparison questions, human review prompts, and the report payload on the same packet.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep this claim covered when changing review packet assembly, active-run review packet defaults, adapter prompt/schema references, artifact path collection, or report artifact collection.
